sections.sectionTitle: Jeremiah in Anathoth Khua-ah Khat Lei

verses.text: Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa in a ukzawh kum sawm leh kum giat a phak kumin, Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suahzawh kum sawm pha ta a, tua kumin Topa in Jeremiah a hopih hi
Tua hun pen Babylon kumpipa' galkapte in Jerusalem khua a sim laitak hi a, kamsangpa Jeremiah zong Judah kumpipa' inn huang sunga thong sungah a kikhumcip laitak ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nangmah in thu genkhol a, ‘ Topa in a cihin-ah: En un, hih khuapi, Babylon kumpipa' khutsungah ka pia ding a, amah in a la ding hi
Judah kumpipa Zedekiah zong Khaldea mite' khutsung pan a suakta kei ding a, Babylon kumpipa' khutsungah a kipia taktak ding hi. Amah tawh maitang kimu-in a ki-en ding uh a, a kiho ding uh hi

Amah in Babylon khua-ah Zedekiah la ding a, ama tungah na ka sep mateng tua lai-ah om ding hi. Khaldea mite na do uh hangin na zo kei ding uh hi, Topa in hong ci hi,’ ci-in bang hangin thu hilh na hi hiam?” ci-in thong sungah a khum hi
Jeremiah in zong, “ Topa in kei hong hopih a

En in, na pano Shullam' tapa Hananel nang kiangah hong pai ding a, ‘Anathoth khua-a ka lo hong lei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a lei thei ding lak panin ka kinaipih pen nangmah na om hi,’ ci-in hong gen ding hi, hong ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa' hong cihna bangmahin thong sungah ka innlak sanggampa hong pai takpi-in hong hopih a, ‘Benjamin gam Anathoth khua-a ka lo hong lei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh, i ngeina bangin a nei ding leh a tankhia ding nangmah na hi hi. Nang-a' dingin lei in,’ hong ci hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Topa' hong hopihna taktak hi, ci-in ka thei hi
“Keimah in zong ka innlak sanggampa Hananel' kiang panin Anathoth khua-a lo ka lei a, ama-a' dingin ngun shekel sawmlesagih ka tehkhia hi
Thukimna lai bawlin, min gelhin, gip khenin, a hong theihpih ding mite zong ka sap khit ciangin tawi khaina-ah sum ka teh hi
Tua ciangin ka kithukimna teng uh a ki-atna, gip a kikhen lai pen leh gip a kikhenlo lai pen ka la a

Neriah' tapa ahi, Mahseiah' tupa Baruk kiangah ka pia hi. Tua laite, ka innlak sanggampa Hananel tawh, tua kileina laite tunga a min uh a gelh a hong theihpih mite tawh thong huangsunga a tu Judah mite tawh a omkim laitakun ka pia hi
Amaute' om laitakin Baruk kiangah
‘Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in a hong genin-ah: Hih gip a kikhen lai leh a kikhenlo laite gel la in la, sialoin sawtveipi a kikep theihna dingin leibeel khat sungah koih in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in a hong genin-ah: Hih gamah innte, lote, leh leenggah lote, mite in a leikikta ding uh hi,’ ci-in ka gen hi
“Neriah' tapa Baruk kiangah kileina lai ka piak khit ciangin Topa' kiangah thu ka ngen a
‘Topa Pasian! Nangma vangpi leh na khut tawh vantung leh leitung na bawl khinzo hi. Nang-a' dingin a haksalua khat beek omlo hi
Nangmah in a kikhel ngeilo itna mi tul tampite' tungah na lak a, ahih hangin pate' mawhnate tate' tungah na thuk hi. Vanglian Topa a kici a lian mahmah, a hat mahmah Pasian aw
na ngimnate lian mahmah a, na sepnate thupi mahmah hi. Mite' nuntak zia khempeuh na mu a, amau' nuntak dan leh a sepna tawh kizui-in mi khempeuh tungah thaman na pia kim hi
Egypt gamah lim leh na lamdangte na lak a, tu-in zong Israel gam leh minam dangte khempeuh tungah lakin, tu-in mun khempeuhah na min thang mahmah hi
Na mi Israel-te Egypt gam panin lim leh na lamdang tawh ahi a, a khauh mahmah a kizan na khut tawh ahi a, lauhuaina lianpi tawh ahi zongin na lakhia a
a pute a pate uh tungah piak dingin na ciamsa, bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na hih gam na pia hi

Amau zong lutin a luahpah uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in na thu hong mangloin, thukham hong zuilo uh a, hih dinga na thupiakte khat beek a hih kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute tungah hih siatna khempeuh na tungsak hi

“ ‘En in, khuapi lakna dingin kan a to khinzo uh hi. Namsau tawh kithahna hang, kialpi hang, leh pulnatna hangin amaute a sim Khaldea mite' khutsungah khuapi a kipia ding hi. Nong gensa bangin hong tun'loh phamawh ahih manin en in, nang' na mu ta hi

Ahih hangin Topa Pasian aw, hih khuapi Khaldea mite' khutsung a tung ding hinapi, nangmah in, “A hong theihpih ding mi sam in la, tua lo lei in,” ci-in nong sawl teitei hi,’ ci-in thu ka ngen hi,” a ci hi
Topa in kei hong hopih a
“En in, kei pen Topa ka hi a, mi khempeuhte' Pasian zong ka hi hi. Kei-a' dingin a haksa lua bang om ahi hiam
Tua ahih manin, Topa in kong cihin-ah: En in, hih khuapi Khaldea mite' khutsung leh Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar' khutsungah ka pia ding a, amah in a la ding hi

Hih khuapi a sim Khaldea mite hong pai-in mei tawh khuapi a hal ding uh a, ka hehna dingin innkhum tungah Baal milimte paknamtui halna tawh a biakna innte uh leh pasian dangte' kiangah tuidawn biakna a piakna uh innte zong a haltum ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite leh Judah mite in a neulai pek uha kipan ka muhna-ah a sia bekbek a gamta uh hi. Keimah Topa in kong cihin-ah, Israel mite in a khut uh tawh milim a bawlna uh hangin kei hong hehsak uh hi
Hih khuapi in, a kisat cila kipan tuni ciangdong hong hehsakin hong thangpaisak ahih manin ka muhna panin ka hemkhia ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite leh Judah mite, a kumpite uh leh a kumpi uliante uh, a siampite uh leh a kamsangte uha kipan Judah mite leh Jerusalem khuamite khempeuh in kei hong hehsakna dingin siatna a bawl uh hi
Amaute in kei hong nungngatin hong maingatlo uh a, ka hilh tawntung hangin ka hilhna a hong mang kei uh hi
Amaute in ka min tawh a kilo biakinnsung nangawnah a kihhuai milimte a koih uh a, a ninsak uh hi

Hinnom Kuam-ah a tapate leh a tanute uh tawh Molek pasian a biakna dingun Baal-a' ding biakna tau sangte a bawl uh hi. Hih a kihhuai na semin, Judah mite mawhna a bawlsakna dingun amaute ka sawl kei a, zong ka ngaihsunkha ngei beek kei hi

“Jeremiah aw, nangmah in hih khuapi, namsau tawh thahna, kialpi tun'na leh pulnatna tawh Babylon kumpipa' khutsungah kipia ding hi, na ci hi. Ahi zongin tu-in tua bang na cihna hih khuapi tawh kisai-in Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong genin-ah
En in, ka hehna, ka thangpaihna leh ka lungkimlohna lianpi tawh ka hawlkhiatna gam khempeuh panin amaute ka kaikhawm kik ding a, hih munah tun'pih kikin, lungmuang takin ka omsak ding hi
Amaute keima mi hi ding uh a, kei pen amaute' Pasian ka hi ding hi
Amaute' hoihna ding leh amaute' nunga a tu a tate uh a hoihna dingin a tawntungin kei hong zahtakna dingun a lungsim uh kikhat sakin, a nuntak dan uh zong ka kikhatsak ding hi

Amaute tungah a tawntungin hoihna ka bawl denna dingin amaute tawh tawntung thuciamna khat ka bawl ding hi. Kei kiang panin a kiheikhiat lohna dingun amaute sungah kei hong zahtakna ding uh lungsim ka guan ding hi
Amaute tungah hoihna ka bawl manin ka lungdam ding a, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh thuman takin hih gamah amaute ka phut ding hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih siatna khempeuh hih mite tungah ka tun'sak mah bangin, amaute' tunga ka khapsa a hoih khempeuh zong ka tungsak pelmawh ding hi
Nangmah in, hih gam pen mihing leh ganhing a ten'lohna gam simtham hi ding a, Khaldea mite' khutsungah kipia ding hi, ci-in na gen hangin tu-in hih gamah lo kileikik ta ding hi

Benjamin gam, Jerusalem khua kimkot leh Judah gam khuapite-a kipan mualtunga khuapite, Shefelah zanglei-a khuapite leh leitaw lam Negeb gama khuapite-ah sum tawh lo kilei ding a, a theihpih mite tawh thukimna min gelhin gip tawh kikhen ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in amaute a gam mah uhah ka omsak kik ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a hong ci hi.
